title: ジャパンカップの後に・得たもの

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And another great showing from Mihono
Bourbon!
Wooooo!

After finishing the race, Mihono Bourbon stands
stock-still among the thunderous cheers pouring
from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Faint tightening in chest area detected. Initiating
scan.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Currently experiencing elevated mood and
shortness of breath—features that are common to
"restlessness" and "excitement."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analysis complete. Maximum levels of
"exhilaration" have been identified.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
You may not have won, but that was a stunning
race, Bourbon!

Fans start shouting words of encouragement one
after another.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Great job, Teio! Great job, Bourbon! That was the
best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: You've come so far, Bourbon! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Tears have been detected in fans' eyes. This
indicates they are experiencing a similar state of
"exhilaration."

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: You were so inspiring out there, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see. So this is what it feels like to "inspire"
others.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I feel... "happy" right now, Trainer.

After Mihono Bourbon changes into clean
clothes, we get ready to leave the Tokyo
Racecourse when someone calls out to us.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the great race, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I should thank you. You helped me obtain
extremely rare knowledge and experience from
our race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're too kind.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
While Tokai Teio laughs cheerfully, Mihono
Bourbon studies her face intently.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But you won. Why do you feel "frustrated" and
not "happy"?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Why? 'Cause I could literally feel just how
amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This kinda thing isn't just about winning or losing!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But... it was so fun that I could get over my
frustration! Really! It was even more fun than I
expected!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So...

Tokai Teio's eyes sparkle as she looks fearlessly
at Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's have a rematch someday!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's the response I was lookin' for. See ya, then!

Mihono Bourbon gives a small, friendly wave in
response as Tokai Teio runs off.
